title: runtime-roots.yaml
description: Per-product runtime root resolution: command_root / config_path / state_home / plugin_root plus the version-floor ceremony fields (`min_version`, `recommended_version`, `min_version_effective_from`, `version_probe`) governed by the version-floor / Bump Ceremony in `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/min-version-bump.md`. Version-pin fields carry concrete values taken from a development-host snapshot.

products.description: Runtime-root blocks keyed by product. Both `codex` and `claude` are required.

host_profiles.description: Optional per-host overrides keyed by `AGENT_RUNTIME_HOST_PROFILE` value (or `uname -s` fallback). When present, install / doctor merges the matching block over the product defaults.

live_home.description: Product runtime home loaded by the agent product (template form: `$CODEX_HOME` / `$HOME/.claude`).

docs_home.description: Home-scope `agent-docs` policy root used by the product.

state_home.description: Writable runtime state directory (template form, with env-var fallbacks).

plugin_root.description: Plugin package root, when the product supports plugin-scoped execution (e.g. `$CODEX_HOME/plugins/<domain>`).

plugin_root_env.description: Env var the product exposes for the plugin root (e.g. Claude's `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT`).

min_version.description: Blocking floor. Below this and past `min_version_effective_from` is a block. Carries a concrete semver range.

recommended_version.description: Warn floor. Below this is a warn.

min_version_effective_from.description: Forward-pin ISO date that gates when a `min_version` bump starts blocking instead of warning.

version_probe.description: Command used by doctor / audit-drift to probe the installed product version. Output is parsed with a permissive semver matcher.
